---
name: template-hygiene-responsive-ui
description: Enforce no inline JS/CSS in templates and keep UI responsive across mobile and desktop.
---

# template-hygiene-responsive-ui

Use for template and UI changes.

Rules:
- No inline JavaScript in templates.
- No inline CSS in templates.
- Use dedicated JS/CSS files.
- Keep UI responsive on mobile and desktop.
- Do not modify `vendor/` files.
